items.title_en: Qwen 3.6 27B is the sweet spot for local development
items.title_zh: Qwen 3.6 27B：本地开发的最佳平衡点
items.summary_en: Qwen 3.6 27B hits a practical sweet spot for local AI development. It provides a capable, smaller model that runs on modest GPUs, easing offline prototyping and testing without cloud latency. For developers, this balance between performance and footprint matters as it accelerates iteration cycles.
items.summary_zh: Qwen 3.6 27B 在本地 AI 开发中找到了实用的平衡点。它具备足够能力、体积适中，能在普通显卡上运行，降低离线原型与测试对云端延迟的依赖。对开发者而言，这种性能与资源的权衡能显著提升迭代速度。

items.title_en: US Supreme Court rules geofence warrants require constitutional protections
items.title_zh: 美国最高法院裁定地理围栏检 warrants 需宪法保护
items.summary_en: The Supreme Court ruled geofence warrants must be protected by Fourth Amendment standards, reinforcing privacy safeguards for location data. The decision shapes how law enforcement can access location information and how tech platforms respond to such requests.
items.summary_zh: 最高法院裁定地理围栏搜查须适用第四修正案标准，加强对定位数据的隐私保护。这一判决影响执法获取位置信息的边界以及科技平台对相关请求的应对。

items.title_en: European ISPs Want Rightsholders Held Accountable for Overblocking Damage
items.title_zh: 欧洲 ISP 希望权利方对过度拦截造成的损害负责
items.summary_en: European ISPs are pushing back on overblocking by rights holders and seeking accountability for damages, signaling ongoing tension between enforcement and civil liberties. The push could influence EU policy on safe harbors, liability, and the economics of content blocking.
items.summary_zh: 欧洲的运营商正就权利方过度拦截造成的损害追究责任，凸显执法与公民自由之间的持续冲突。这一举动可能影响欧盟关于安全港、法律责任及内容拦截经济性的相关政策。

items.title_en: Pollen tried to remove my article and Google is assisting with it
items.title_zh: Pollen 试图删除我的文章，Google 正在协助
items.summary_en: An investigative post claims Pollen tried to suppress a journalist's article about Callum Negus-Fancey, with Google allegedly aiding the effort. The episode highlights how platform power can influence publication visibility and the fragility of independent reporting in high-stakes tech stories. It also raises questions about transparency and due process in takedown cooperation between platforms and search engines.
items.summary_zh: 据称，Pollen 试图删除一篇关于 Callum Negus-Fancey 的文章，谷歌据称在协助此事。此事揭示了平台权力对内容可见性和独立报道的脆弱性，引发对透明度与程序正义的担忧。事件也凸显了在高风险科技报道中协作取证过程的复杂性。

items.title_en: Rocketlab acquires Iridium
items.title_zh: Rocket Lab 收购 Iridium：历史性交易
items.summary_en: Rocket Lab's planned acquisition of Iridium Communications would create a vertically integrated space services company, combining launch, satellite operations, and communications. The deal signals ongoing consolidation in the space economy and could reshape small-satellite market dynamics. If approved, it may accelerate end-to-end offerings for customers building constellations.
items.summary_zh: Rocket Lab 将收购 Iridium，整合发射、卫星运营与通信，可能打造垂直整合的太空服务公司。此举反映了太空产业的持续整合，并可能重塑小卫星市场格局。若获批，或将推动面向星座构建的端到端解决方案加速落地。

items.title_en: Instagram is incorporating users' photos in ads for Meta Glasses
items.title_zh: Instagram 将用户照片用于 Meta 眼镜广告
items.summary_en: Instagram plans to use users’ photos in ads for Meta Glasses, raising concerns about consent and image rights in brand campaigns. The policy signals monetization of user content and highlights privacy considerations for social-media-driven hardware experiences.
items.summary_zh: Instagram 将用户照片用于 Meta 眼镜广告，引发对同意与形象权在品牌推广中的问题。此举体现了用户内容的商业化，同时让隐私问题在社交媒体驱动的硬件体验中成为焦点。

items.title_en: A native graphical shell for SSH
items.title_zh: SSH 的原生图形界面外壳
items.summary_en: A native graphical shell for SSH enables GUI-based remote sessions, simplifying workflows for users who prefer visuals over a terminal. It demonstrates how GUI front-ends can complement SSH by integrating file transfer, terminal emulation, and session management.
items.summary_zh: SSH 的原生图形界面外壳让远程会话以图形界面形式展开，提升偏好图形界面的用户的工作流。该方案展示了图形前端如何与 SSH 结合，提供文件传输、终端仿真和会话管理等一体化功能。

items.title_en: Tidal AI Policy
items.title_zh: Tidal AI 政策
items.summary_en: Tidal AI Policy outlines how the music streaming service uses AI, including training data rights and permissioning for artist content. The policy signals how the industry is grappling with copyright, royalties, and user privacy as AI-generated music becomes more common.
items.summary_zh: Tidal 的 AI 政策界定了音乐流媒体在人工智能领域的使用规则，包括训练数据权利与艺术家内容授权。该政策折射出行业在 AI 生成音乐日益增多的背景下，如何处理版权、版税和用户隐私等问题。

items.title_en: Age verification is just a precursor to automated attribution of speech
items.title_zh: 年龄验证只是自动化语音归因的前提
items.summary_en: The piece argues that age verification schemes may simply enable automatic attribution of who said what in speech. As identity becomes tied to voice data, safeguards around privacy, consent, and misuse become critical, with implications for policy and AI system design.
items.summary_zh: 文中指出，年龄验证可能只是实现对语音进行自动归因的前提条件。当声音数据与身份绑定时，隐私、同意和滥用防护就变得尤为关键，对政策和 AI 系统设计都会产生影响。

items.title_en: The CEO of Mullvad is the main financer of the Swedish Örebro party
items.title_zh: Mullvad 的 CEO 是瑞典极右翼 Örebro 党的主要资助人
items.summary_en: The Mullvad VPN's CEO is reported as the main financier of the far-right Örebro party in Sweden, raising questions about platform neutrality and trust for privacy-focused services. The revelation prompts discussion about funding sources and corporate ethics in the privacy space.
items.summary_zh: 据报道，Mullvad VPN 的 CEO 是瑞典极右翼 Örebro 党的主要资助人，对注重隐私的服务的中立性和信任度带来质疑。此事引发对资金来源与科技隐私领域企业伦理的关注。

items.title_en: Mag 7 starting to underperform [pdf]
items.title_zh: Mag 7 开始走弱的简报
items.summary_en: A briefing notes Mag 7 starting to underperform relative to prior expectations, signaling a shift in performance outlook and potentially affecting project planning and budgeting.
items.summary_zh: 简报指出 Mag 7 已开始表现不佳，低于先前预期，暗示性能前景的变化，可能影响项目规划与预算安排。

items.title_en: WATaBoy: JIT-Ing Game Boy Instructions to WASM Beats a Native Interpreter
items.title_zh: WATaBoy：将 Game Boy 指令 JIT 编译为 WASM，胜过原生解释器
items.summary_en: WATaBoy demonstrates that compiling Game Boy instructions to WebAssembly at runtime can outperform a hand-written native interpreter on common hardware. The project showcases WASM as a high-performance backend for emulation, offering portability across platforms. It also raises questions about further optimizations and toolchain choices for emulators.
items.summary_zh: WATaBoy 展示了在运行时将 Game Boy 指令 JIT 编译为 WebAssembly，甚至超越了某些硬件上的本地解释器的速度。此做法凸显 WASM 作为高性能后端在仿真领域的可行性与跨平台性，同时也引发对进一步优化与工具链选择的思考。

items.title_en: HackerRank open sourced its ATS. My resume scored 90/100. Oh wait 74. No – 88
items.title_zh: HackerRank 开源其 ATS，简历评分波动引发关注
items.summary_en: HackerRank released its ATS as open source, exposing how resumes are scored in practice. A single resume yielded a string of conflicting scores (90, then 74, then 88), illustrating instability and potential bias in automated screening. The takeaway: hiring AI needs better transparency, reproducibility, and fairness checks.
items.summary_zh: HackerRank 将其 ATS 开源，使人们能审视简历评分的全过程。一次测试的简历竟得到 90、74、88 等不同分数，凸显自动筛选的不稳定性和潜在偏见。要点是招聘 AI 需加强透明性、可重复性与公平性。

items.title_en: Samsung, SK Hynix, Micron Sued in US over Memory Price Fixing
items.title_zh: 三星、SK 海力士、美光在美国因内存价格垄断被起诉
items.summary_en: A US lawsuit accuses Samsung, SK Hynix, and Micron of memory price fixing, potentially affecting pricing dynamics and competition in the memory market. The case adds to antitrust scrutiny of chipmakers and could influence regulatory actions.
items.summary_zh: 美国对三星、SK海力士和美光提起的价格垄断诉讼指控其串通操纵内存价格，可能改变市场定价与竞争格局，并增加对芯片厂商的监管压力。

items.title_en: Studio Canal Movies purchased on PlayStation Store removed without refund
items.title_zh: PlayStation Store 下架 StudioCanal 电影且不退款
items.summary_en: Licensing issues led to StudioCanal movies being removed from the PlayStation Store with no refunds for affected customers, illustrating how licensing can abruptly disrupt digital libraries. The episode highlights consumer rights and the fragility of library access in a licensed ecosystem.
items.summary_zh: 因授权问题，StudioCanal 的电影从 PlayStation Store 下架且不提供退款，凸显数字库的脆弱性以及许可条款对消费者权益的影响。

items.title_en: What happens when you run a CUDA kernel?
items.title_zh: 运行 CUDA 内核时会发生什么？
items.summary_en: Launching a CUDA kernel schedules thousands of threads across blocks on GPU cores, using SIMT execution with warps and shared memory. Understanding occupancy, memory access patterns, and synchronization is key to performance, while common pitfalls include race conditions and poor memory coalescing.
items.summary_zh: CUDA 内核启动后，GPU 将在多个流处理器上按块和线程调度执行，使用 SIMT 模型、warp 及共享内存。提升性能的关键在于把握占用率、内存访问模式与同步机制，常见坑包括竞态条件与内存访问不当造成的性能损失。

items.title_en: Ornith-1.0: self-improving open-source models for agentic coding
items.title_zh: Ornith-1.0：具备代理能力的自我改进开源模型
items.summary_en: Ornith-1.0 pushes open-source models toward self-improvement for agentic coding. The project explores mechanisms for models to refine their behavior and tooling autonomously, reducing human-labeled overhead. If successful, it could accelerate autonomous programming tasks and bring more capable AI-assisted development to the community.
items.summary_zh: Ornith-1.0 将开源模型推向自我改进，聚焦具备代理能力的编码任务。它尝试让模型自主优化行为和工具使用，降低人工标注的开销。一旦成熟，可能显著加速自动化编程和 AI 辅助开发的能力落地。

items.title_en: The Radiation Exposure Lie
items.title_zh: 《辐射暴露的谎言》
items.summary_en: The Radiation Exposure Lie interrogates how risk is communicated and sometimes distorted around radiation. It highlights misperceptions that can influence policy and public behavior, reminding technologists to demand clear, data-driven risk framing. The piece underscores a broader caution about science communication in tech policy.
items.summary_zh: 《辐射暴露的谎言》质疑有关辐射风险的传播和常见扭曲，揭示可能影响政策与公众行为的认知偏差。作者强调需要清晰、以数据为基础的风险表达，提醒科技从业者关注科技政策中的科学传播问题。

items.title_en: GLM 5.2 beats Claude in our benchmarks
items.title_zh: GLM 5.2 在基准测试中击败 Claude
items.summary_en: GLM 5.2 beat Claude in our benchmarks, showing that newer open models are narrowing the gap with top proprietary rivals. The result reinforces that cost, licensing, and ecosystem maturity can influence real-world decisions as AI hardware and tooling evolve.
items.summary_zh: GLM 5.2 在我们的基准测试中击败 Claude，显示较新的开源模型正在缩小与顶级专有模型的差距。该结果强调，在推理硬件和工具集持续演进的背景下，成本、许可与生态系统成熟度可能成为实际选型的关键因素。

items.title_en: CachyOS June 2026 Release
items.title_zh: CachyOS 2026 年 6 月版发布
items.summary_en: CachyOS June 2026 release brings feature updates, performance improvements, and package refreshes; aligns with a rolling-release model and often includes kernel and desktop polish.
items.summary_zh: CachyOS 2026 年 6 月版带来功能更新、性能提升和软件包刷新，遵循滚动发布模型，通常还包含内核与桌面方面的改进。

items.title_en: Building Principia for Windows XP
items.title_zh: 在 Windows XP 上构建 Principia
items.summary_en: Building Principia for Windows XP documents porting challenges to an aging OS, including outdated toolchains and missing APIs. The project highlights retro-computing preservation, compatibility work, and the joy of bringing modern software ideas to legacy environments.
items.summary_zh: 在 Windows XP 上构建 Principia 的过程记录了对这类老旧系统的移植挑战，包括过时的工具链与缺失的 API。该项目体现了对复古计算的保留与兼容性工作的价值，并展示了在遗留环境中尝试新想法的乐趣。

items.title_en: Why did this journal retract two 1940s papers by Max Planck?
items.title_zh: 为何这本期刊撤回两篇1940年代的马克斯·普朗克论文？
items.summary_en: A journal retracted two 1940s papers attributed to Max Planck, due to issues with attribution and data provenance that only emerged after decades. The retractions raise questions about the integrity of historical science records and the process by which journals validate older work. They also reflect how modern standards can reveal problems in long-accepted publications.
items.summary_zh: 一份期刊撤回了两篇20世纪40年代署名马克斯·普朗克的论文，原因涉及署名与数据来源问题，这些问题在多年后才被揭露。此举引发对历史科学记录完整性的质疑，以及现代期刊在核验早期工作时的流程改进需求，同时也反映了新标准可能暴露长期被接受的出版物中的问题。

items.title_en: Amazon Is Awash with AI-Written Guideslop for Games That Aren't Even Out
items.title_zh: 亚马逊遍布 AI 编写的尚未上市游戏攻略
items.summary_en: AmazonIs Awash with AI-Written Guideslop for Games That Aren't Even Out describes AI-generated game guides appearing for unreleased titles. The trend raises concerns about quality, spoilers, and SEO manipulation, with potential downstream effects on reader trust and publisher ecosystems. It spotlights the tension between automation and editorial standards in product content.
items.summary_zh: 亚马逊充斥着针对尚未上市游戏的 AI 编写攻略内容，带来质量、剧透和搜索优化操控等担忧。此趋势可能侵蚀读者信任、影响出版生态，并凸显自动化与内容编辑标准之间的矛盾。

items.title_en: Microsoft Needs Windows Lite
items.title_zh: 微软需要 Windows Lite
items.summary_en: The author argues for a lighter, more modular Windows edition—Windows Lite—tailored to low-footprint devices and cloud-centric use cases. The concept emphasizes reducing system footprint, splitting core OS from optional components, and improving efficiency for constrained hardware and services.
items.summary_zh: 作者提出需要一个更轻量、模块化的 Windows 版本——Windows Lite，面向资源受限设备和云端场景。该构想强调降低系统足迹、把核心系统与可选组件分离，并提升对受限硬件和服务的效率。

items.title_en: Sandia National Labs SA3000 8085 CPU
items.title_zh: 桑迪亚国家实验室的 SA3000 8085 CPU
items.summary_en: Sandia National Laboratories' SA3000 implements the 8085 instruction set as a modern CPU, serving as a hardware research and education platform. It piques interest for retro architecture fans and hobbyist hardware projects, showing how government labs contribute to open hardware exploration.
items.summary_zh: 桑迪亚国家实验室的 SA3000 实现了 8085 指令集，作为现代化的 CPU 研究与教育平台。该项目吸引了复古架构爱好者与硬件爱好者的关注，展示政府实验室在开源硬件探索中的作用。

items.title_en: NixOS 26.05
items.title_zh: NixOS 26.05 发布
items.summary_en: NixOS 26.05 release notes cover package-manager improvements, system configuration enhancements, and bug fixes, reflecting ongoing refinement of the distribution's declarative approach.
items.summary_zh: NixOS 26.05 发布说明涵盖包管理改进、系统配置增强以及错误修复，体现了该发行版声明式配置模型的持续完善。

items.title_en: EU to legislate about Chat Control behind closed doors
items.title_zh: 欧盟在幕后推动聊天监控立法
items.summary_en: Reports indicate the EU plans to legislate on Chat Control behind closed doors, raising concerns about transparency and civil liberties. The move signals a push to regulate private communications and could set norms that influence global tech policy.
items.summary_zh: 据报道，欧盟正在幕后推动“聊天控制”相关立法，引发对透明度和公民自由的担忧。此举表明欧洲正推动对私人通信的规制，可能对全球科技政策产生重要影响。

items.title_en: You Don't Know Jack About Formal Verification
items.title_zh: 你对形式化验证一无所知
items.summary_en: ACM Queue argues that many assumptions about formal verification are misguided, clarifying what it can prove, what it cannot, and how it fits into software assurance and safety-critical development.
items.summary_zh: ACM Queue 文章澄清了对形式化验证的常见误解，解释了它能证明的内容、不能证明的内容以及在软件保障和安全关键开发中的作用。

items.title_en: Professor denounces mass AI fraud on an exam at Brown
items.title_zh: 布朗大学教授谴责考试中的大规模 AI 作弊
items.summary_en: A Brown University professor condemns widespread AI-assisted cheating on an exam, highlighting threats to academic integrity. The discussion explores policy responses, detection strategies, and the need for robust assessment design in the AI era.
items.summary_zh: 布朗大学一位教授谴责在考试中广泛使用 AI 作弊，强调对学术诚信的威胁。讨论探讨了政策应对、检测策略以及在 AI 时代加强评估设计的必要性。

items.title_en: JumpServer: Open-Source Privileged Access Management
items.title_zh: JumpServer：开源特权访问管理工具
items.summary_en: JumpServer emerges as an open-source Privileged Access Management solution. It offers centralized access control, session recording, and auditing for critical systems, presenting a cost-effective alternative to proprietary PAM. For security teams, it lowers barriers to strong PAM practices and integration with existing infrastructure.
items.summary_zh: JumpServer 作为开源特权访问管理解决方案渐入人心，提供集中访问控制、会话记录与审计等能力，帮助关键系统的安全管控。对安全团队而言，它提供了一更具性价比的替代方案，易于与现有基础设施整合。

items.title_en: Librepods: AirPods liberated
items.title_zh: Librepods：AirPods 自由化项目
items.summary_en: Librepods aims to liberate AirPods by removing vendor-imposed constraints and enabling user-controlled firmware experiments. The project advocates for ownership and privacy but may raise legal, warranty, and security questions.
items.summary_zh: Librepods 通过移除厂商设定的限制、让用户能够控制固件来实现 AirPods 的自由化。该项目倡导拥有权与隐私，但也可能带来法律、保修与安全方面的问题。

items.title_en: Rebuilding the Computer Room
items.title_zh: 重建计算机房
items.summary_en: A personal account of rebuilding a home computer room, covering layout, cooling, cable management, and workspace ergonomics to create a productive tinkering space.
items.summary_zh: 博主记录重建家庭计算机房的过程，涉及布局、散热、线缆整理和工作空间的人体工学，以打造一个高效的动手实验环境。

items.title_en: WSL container is now available for public preview
items.title_zh: WSL 容器公开预览
items.summary_en: WSL container is now available in public preview, enabling Linux container workloads to run more natively on Windows and streamlining workflows that bridge Linux and Windows tooling.
items.summary_zh: WSL 容器现已进入公开预览，使 Linux 容器工作负载在 Windows 上更原生地运行，并简化了 Linux 与 Windows 工具链的协同工作流程。

items.title_en: I used Claude Code to get a second opinion on my MRI
items.title_zh: 我用 Claude Code 为我的 MRI 做了第二意见
items.summary_en: A clinician uses Claude Code to review an MRI, illustrating how AI copilots can augment radiology while raising caveats. This kind of usage emphasizes AI as an assistive, not replacement, tool in clinical workflows.
items.summary_zh: 作者用 Claude Code 对 MRI 进行了二次意见的评估，展示了 AI 辅助工具在放射学领域的潜在作用。文中指出了如快速获取第二意见和广泛模式识别等实际好处，同时警示了可靠性、幻觉输出与隐私方面的局限性，强调 AI 仅应作为临床流程中的辅助工具。

items.title_en: Historical memory prices 1960-2026
items.title_zh: 1960–2026 的内存价格历史
items.summary_en: The Stanford memory prices history chart tracks the long-run decline in memory prices, including RAM and storage. The data show dramatic declines over decades, with spikes tied to supply shocks and tech cycles, informing hardware budgeting and product lifecycles.
items.summary_zh: 这份数据集揭示了记忆体（如 RAM）价格在 1960 年到 2026 年的长期下降趋势，并受供给冲击与科技周期的影响出现波动。这些数据为硬件预算与产品生命周期提供了参考。

items.title_en: .garden TLD's change to a bad neighborhood
items.title_zh: .garden 顶级域名的变更踩进了“坏邻里”
items.summary_en: .garden TLD's change to a bad neighborhood notes a policy or reputation shift that makes the domain category riskier. A prudent reminder to audit TLD choices.
items.summary_zh: .garden 顶级域名的变动带来“坏邻里”声誉风险，可能影响信任度、钓鱼风险与品牌安全。文章探讨域名声誉如何影响安全决策，强调 DNS 治理对开发者和运营者的重要性。

items.title_en: The Humbling of the Once Almighty Dollar
items.title_zh: 昔日无敌美元的挫败
items.summary_en: The Humbling of the Once Almighty Dollar argues that dollar dominance is facing headwinds from macro shifts and de-dollarization trends. It reframes the finance backdrop behind tech strategy.
items.summary_zh: 《曾经的无敌美元的挫败》讨论美元主导地位正面临宏观经济与去美元化趋势的挑战。文章分析对科技供应链、跨境支付与全球定价的影响，建议企业分散风险、考虑替代货币，并从财政环境变化中重新审视技术策略。

items.title_en: The KIDS Act would require age checks to get online
items.title_zh: KIDS Act 将强制在线年龄验证
items.summary_en: The KIDS Act proposes mandatory online age verification, aiming to shield minors but raising privacy and profiling concerns. Critics warn it could normalize surveillance and create security risks for users.
items.summary_zh: KIDS Act 提议对在线服务强制进行年龄验证，旨在保护未成年人；但也引发隐私与画像化担忧。批评者警告这可能使监控常态化并带来安全风险。

items.title_en: Herdr: Agent multiplexer that lives in your terminal
items.title_zh: Herdr：在终端里运行的代理多路复用器
items.summary_en: Herdr is a terminal-centric tool that multiplexes multiple AI agents, letting you route tasks and keep context within a single shell. It simplifies managing several assistants side-by-side and can boost productivity in CLI-heavy workflows.
items.summary_zh: Herdr 是一个在终端内工作的代理多路复用器，允许同时运行和切换多个代理，方便在一个 shell 中分派任务、维持上下文。对以 CLI 为主的工作流来说，可以显著提升效率。

items.title_en: 5k menus from the New York Public Library’s Buttolph Collection (1880-1920)
items.title_zh: 纽约公共图书馆 Buttolph 收藏的五千份菜单（1880-1920）
items.summary_en: The NYPL’s Buttolph Collection includes around 5,000 menus from 1880–1920, offering a rich dataset for historians and data scientists. Text mining these menus reveals shifts in cuisine, pricing, and social norms across a transformative era.
items.summary_zh: 纽约公共图书馆的 Buttolph 收藏约五千份菜单，覆盖 1880–1920 年代，为历史研究者与数据科学家提供丰富的数据集。通过对菜单中的菜名、价格与语言进行挖掘，可以揭示这一变革时期的饮食、定价与社会风俗的变化。

items.title_en: Data breach exposes up to 14.2M email logins at six ISPs
items.title_zh: 六家 ISP 数据泄露：暴露多达 1420 万电子邮件登录信息
items.summary_en: A data breach exposed up to 14.2 million email logins across six ISPs, enabling credential stuffing and targeted phishing. The incident underscores the need for stronger password hygiene, multi-factor authentication, and better credential storage.
items.summary_zh: 六家 ISP 的数据泄露暴露多达 1420 万电子邮件登录信息，可能被用于凭据填充和定向钓鱼。这一事件凸显加强密码策略、多因素认证及更安全的凭据存储的必要性。

items.title_en: Why narcissistic leaders resist remote work
items.title_zh: 为什么自恋型领导抵制远程工作
items.summary_en: Why narcissistic leaders resist remote work synthesizes findings that narcissism correlates with a preference for visible presence and control. Remote work dynamics erode status signaling and micromanagement opportunities, so such leaders resist it. The piece offers implications for organizational design and leadership development in distributed teams.
items.summary_zh: 《为什么自恋型领导抵制远程工作》综述研究发现，自恋型领导倾向于维持对团队的可见掌控感，远程工作削弱了他们的地位信号与微管控机会，因此抵制之。这对分布式团队的组织设计与领导力培养具有启示意义。

items.title_en: Show HN: Zanagrams
items.title_zh: Show HN：Zanagrams
items.summary_en: Zanagrams is a Show HN project that offers a fast, minimalist platform for generating and solving word anagrams. Its focused UX and emphasis on keyboard-first interaction illustrate how small, well-executed ideas can stand out on Hacker News.
items.summary_zh: Zanagrams 是一个 Show HN 项目，提供一个快速、简洁的单词变位生成与解答平台。它以聚焦的用户体验和键盘优先的交互方式，展示了一个小而精的点子如何在 Hacker News 上脱颖而出。

items.title_en: Micro-Agent: Beat Frontier Models with Collaboration Inside Model API
items.title_zh: Micro-Agent：在模型 API 内实现协作以超越前沿模型
items.summary_en: Micro-Agent describes a collaboration-centric approach to frontier models via a cohesive model API. By enabling multiple agents to share context and coordinate within a single interface, it aims to boost performance on complex tasks without fragmenting tooling. It signals a shift toward more modular, collaborative AI systems.
items.summary_zh: Micro-Agent 介绍了一种在单一模型 API 内实现多代理协作的前沿模型方法。通过让多个代理共用上下文、在同一接口内协同工作，目标是提升对复杂任务的处理能力，同时避免碎片化工具链。这预示着 AI 系统向更模块化、协作化发展。

items.title_en: Working with AI
items.title_zh: 与 AI 共事
items.summary_en: HTMX's essay on working with AI emphasizes practical collaboration, human-in-the-loop workflows, and designing systems that respect AI limitations while boosting productivity.
items.summary_zh: HTMX 的文章强调在工作中与 AI 合作的实际做法，倡导人机协同的工作流与在尊重 AI 局限性的前提下提升生产力。

items.title_en: We took away psychological safety and then told everyone to be more productive
items.title_zh: 我们拿走了心理安全感，然后让每个人更高效
items.summary_en: A critique of productivity-focused management that sacrifices psychological safety; argues sustainable high performance requires trust, inclusion, and safety culture, with strategies to restore safety without sacrificing output.
items.summary_zh: 对以生产力为导向的管理方式的批评，指出若牺牲心理安全就难以实现可持续的高性能；提出恢复安全感、建立信任与包容文化，同时维持产出的方法。

items.title_en: DeepSeek V4 Peak Valley Pricing Change
items.title_zh: DeepSeek V4 峰谷定价调整
items.summary_en: DeepSeek V4's peak-valley pricing model has been adjusted, signaling a pricing strategy shift for its compute/data services and impacting cost predictability and usage planning.
items.summary_zh: DeepSeek V4 的峰谷定价模型已调整，标志着其计算/数据服务的定价策略发生变化，将影响成本可预测性与用量规划。

items.title_en: The curious case of the disappearing Polish S (2015)
items.title_zh: 波兰字母 S 消失的怪事
items.summary_en: A typography/encoding quirk where the Polish letter S vanishes in certain renderings, illustrating Unicode and font shaping quirks.
items.summary_zh: 关于在某些文本渲染中波兰字母 S 消失的排版/编码怪现象，揭示了 Unicode 与字体排版的细节问题。

items.title_en: Tokenmaxxing is dead, long live tokenmaxxing
items.title_zh: Tokenmaxxing 已死，Tokenmaxxing 将长存
items.summary_en: Tokenmaxxing has seen a pivot: the old form may be fading, but the core mindset remains—optimizing prompts, tool use, and token budgets will continue under new guises as models and pricing evolve. The post argues that while the practice changes, the incentives to maximize efficiency persist.
items.summary_zh: 该文认为“Tokenmaxxing”的旧形式或已衰退，但核心思维仍在：在新模型与定价结构下，优化提示、工具使用和 token 使用的动机将以新的形式继续存在。

items.title_en: Knowledge Distillation of Black-Box Large Language Models (2024)
items.title_zh: 对黑箱大语言模型的知识蒸馏（2024）
items.summary_en: This 2024 work studies distilling knowledge from black-box LLMs into smaller, trainable models without access to internal weights. Through comparisons of techniques like output-based distillation and data augmentation, it shows trade-offs between fidelity and efficiency.
items.summary_zh: 这篇 2024 年的工作研究在无法访问内部权重的前提下，将黑箱大语言模型的知识蒸馏到更小的模型中。通过对比输出蒸馏、数据增强等方法，揭示保真度与效率之间的权衡。

items.title_en: A way to exclude sensitive files issue still open for OpenAI Codex
items.title_zh: OpenAI Codex 的排除敏感文件方法仍未解决
items.summary_en: An open issue around how to exclude sensitive files from Codex training or generation remains unresolved. The discussion highlights ongoing data governance and privacy challenges in deploying code-generating AI, where guarding private or proprietary content is critical.
items.summary_zh: 关于如何从 Codex 的训练或输出中排除敏感文件的讨论仍未有定论，尚处于未解决状态。此议题凸显了代码生成模型在数据治理和隐私保护方面的持续挑战，以及对私有或机密内容的防护需求。

items.title_en: TOP500 at ISC’26: We have a New Number 1 Supercomputer
items.title_zh: ISC’26 TOP500：诞生新一代第一的超级计算机
items.summary_en: ISC’26 TOP500 reveals a new number-one supercomputer, underscoring ongoing advances toward exascale performance. The shift reflects how HPC architectures—driven by accelerators and energy-aware design—reshape workloads in science, AI, and simulation.
items.summary_zh: ISC’26 TOP500 公布新一代第一名超级计算机，凸显向百亿亿级性能迈进的持续进展。此变动反映出以加速器与节能设计为驱动的 HPC 架构正在重塑科学、AI 与仿真等工作负载。

items.title_en: Dissecting Apple's Sparse Image Format (ASIF)
items.title_zh: 解剖苹果的稀疏图像格式（ASIF）
items.summary_en: Apple's ASIF sparse image format is a storage-efficient image format used by macOS for disk images. The article delves into how ASIF organizes sparse data, its on-disk layout, and practical implications for tooling, backups, and performance when dealing with large disk images. For developers and storage engineers, understanding ASIF can inform how to read, write, and optimize sparse images.
items.summary_zh: 文章解析苹果的稀疏图像格式 ASIF 的数据组织与磁盘布局，阐明了它在处理大规模磁盘镜像时的存储效率与性能影响。内容涵盖对工具链、备份与读写性能的实际影响，帮助开发者和存储工程师更好地读取、写入和优化稀疏镜像。

items.title_en: Daisugi, the Japanese technique of growing trees out of other trees (2020)
items.title_zh: 大杉术：日本通过让树从其他树上长出新树的做法（2020）
items.summary_en: Daisugi is a Japanese forestry technique where live trees are grown from the branches of other trees to harvest straight timber without cutting down the parent. It represents an early example of sustainable forestry and clever resource management.
items.summary_zh: 大杉术是日本的一种林业技术，通过让活树从其他树的枝干上生长出新树，从而在不砍伐母树的情况下获取笔直木材。这一做法是可持续林业与资源管理的早期典范。

items.title_en: Working around dragons with the Lemote Yeeloong laptop and OpenBSD
items.title_zh: 用 Lemote Yeeloong 笔记本与 OpenBSD 的生存笔记
items.summary_en: A retro-tech diary recounts installing OpenBSD on a Lemote Yeeloong laptop, a machine built around the Loongson CPU. It details the hardware quirks, drivers, and boot issues encountered, plus workarounds and patches. The post underscores the enduring appeal of free software tinkering on obscure hardware.
items.summary_zh: 这篇回顾性笔记记录了在以龙芯处理器为基础的 Lemote Yeeloong 笔记本上安装 OpenBSD 的过程，面临硬件兼容性、驱动与引导问题等挑战，并给出相应的解决方法与补丁。文章凸显了在冷门硬件上坚持开源、动手实践的魅力。

items.title_en: HamsterOS: A graphical desktop OS that fits on a 1.44MB floppy
items.title_zh: HamsterOS：可放进 1.44MB 软盘的图形桌面操作系统
items.summary_en: HamsterOS packs a complete graphical desktop into a 1.44MB floppy image, illustrating extreme minimalist OS design and a nostalgic route to GUI on tiny hardware.
items.summary_zh: HamsterOS 将完整图形桌面塞进 1.44MB 软盘镜像，展示了极简操作系统设计以及在极小硬件上实现 GUI 的怀旧路径。

items.title_en: It's Linux, on a Sega Genesis
items.title_zh: Sega Genesis 上的 Linux
items.summary_en: A story about running Linux on a Sega Genesis, highlighting extreme portability and the appeal of getting a modern OS on classic hardware, with implications for retro-computing enthusiasts and education.
items.summary_zh: 讲述在世嘉 Genesis 主机上移植并运行 Linux 的尝试，展示在经典硬件上跑现代操作系统的极端可移植性，并为复古计算爱好者和教育场景提供启发。

items.title_en: Counterexamples in Type Systems
items.title_zh: 类型系统中的反例
items.summary_en: Counterexamples in type systems illustrate that intuitive properties can fail, underscoring the importance of formal reasoning in language design and trusted software foundations.
items.summary_zh: 类型系统中的反例表明直觉在某些情况下并不成立，强调在语言设计和可信软件基础中的形式化推理的重要性。

items.title_en: Examining circuit boards from the Space Shuttle's I/O Processor
items.title_zh: Space Shuttle I/O 处理器的电路板考察
items.summary_en: A deep dive into Space Shuttle I/O Processor boards reveals the hardware that ran critical avionics.
items.summary_zh: 这篇文章深入解读航天飞机 I/O 处理器的电路板，展示了在关键飞行控制中运行的硬件。文中介绍了板卡的架构、设计细节与挑战，并从历史 NASA 系统中提取了可靠性与硬件安全性的经验教训。

items.title_en: WASM on the JVM Ships Under the Bytecode Alliance
items.title_zh: WASM 在 JVM 上落地：Bytecode Alliance 成员
items.summary_en: WASM on the JVM ships Under the Bytecode Alliance reports progress integrating WebAssembly with the JVM ecosystem. The move enables running WASM modules alongside Java tooling, promising better language interoperability and isolation boundaries. It marks a notable step toward polyglot runtimes in the JVM space.
items.summary_zh: WASM 在 JVM 上落地，字节码联盟成员进一步推动 WebAssembly 与 JVM 的整合。该进展让 WASM 模块能够在 JVM 生态中与 Java 工具链并存，提升语言互操作性与隔离性。这是 JVM 生态下实现多语言运行时的重要一步。

items.title_en: Show HN: DRM-Free Books
items.title_zh: Show HN：无 DRM 的图书
items.summary_en: Show HN features a collection of DRM-free books, illustrating demand for unencumbered digital libraries. By removing DRM, it argues for easier sharing, long-term preservation, and improved user rights.
items.summary_zh: Show HN 展示了一批无 DRM 的图书，体现了对无版权限制数字图书馆的需求。移除 DRM 能带来更易分享、长期保存和提升用户权益的好处。

items.title_en: In San Francisco, Even $180k Tech Salaries Are No Longer Enough
items.title_zh: 在旧金山，180k 美元的科技薪水也不再够用
items.summary_en: The cost of living in San Francisco has outpaced tech salaries, with even $180k salaries failing to keep up with housing and living expenses, prompting discussions about talent geography and compensation models.
items.summary_zh: 旧金山的生活成本已经超过科技行业薪酬水平，即使年薪 18 万美元也难以覆盖高房价等开销，引发对人才分布与薪酬模式的讨论。

items.title_en: DLL that was not present in memory despite not being formally unloaded
items.title_zh: 未正式卸载却不在内存中的 DLL
items.summary_en: A Windows debugging note discusses a DLL that wasn't present in memory even though the loader hadn't formally unloaded it, revealing quirks in module management. It highlights nuances between loaded modules and actual memory residency useful for debugging.
items.summary_zh: 这篇微软技术博客记录了一个 DLL 即使未被正式卸载，内存中却并不存在的情况，揭示了模块管理中的细微差别。此现象对调试、内存映射和性能分析具有参考价值。

items.title_en: More evidence is consistent with possible ancient life on Mars (2025)
items.title_zh: 更多证据支持火星存在古代生命的可能性（2025）
items.summary_en: New findings add to the growing but inconclusive evidence for ancient life on Mars, strengthening biosignature arguments while stopping short of confirming life.
items.summary_zh: 新的发现进一步强化了关于火星存在古代生命的证据，但仍未达到确定性，只是增加了生物标志信号的可能性。

items.title_en: EU countries move to revive temporary message-scanning regime
items.title_zh: 欧盟国家推动恢复临时消息扫描制度
items.summary_en: EU member states move to revive a temporary regime for scanning encrypted messages, raising privacy concerns about mass content surveillance and potential abuse. The plan could push back against end-to-end encryption, prompting debates on safeguards, proportionality, and the effectiveness of such measures in protecting citizens.
items.summary_zh: 欧盟成员国推动恢复对加密消息的临时扫描制度，引发对大规模内容监控与滥用风险的隐私担忧。此举可能削弱端对端加密，引发关于安全性、比例性与实际效用的辩论，需权衡公民隐私与执法需求。

items.title_en: Reading the Internals of PostgreSQL: Database Cluster, Databases, and Tables
items.title_zh: 阅读 PostgreSQL 的内部结构：数据库集群、数据库与表
items.summary_en: A guide to PostgreSQL internals detailing how clusters, databases, and tables relate, and how system catalogs, WAL, and on-disk layouts govern data organization and performance.
items.summary_zh: 本指南深入讲解 PostgreSQL 的内部结构，说明数据库集群、数据库与表之间的关系，以及系统目录、WAL 与磁盘布局如何影响数据组织和性能。

items.title_en: Ansede – an offline SAST scanner I built to catch IDOR and auth bypass
items.title_zh: Ansede：离线 SAST 扫描器，用于发现 IDOR 与认证绕过
items.summary_en: Ansede is an offline SAST scanner I built to catch IDOR and authentication bypass flaws. It runs locally, scanning code paths for insecure direct object references and auth bypass patterns without sending data to external services. It demonstrates a hands-on approach to building lightweight security tooling for internal apps.
items.summary_zh: Ansede 是我搭建的离线 SAST 扫描器，用来发现 IDOR 和认证绕过等安全缺陷。它在本地运行，对代码路径进行分析，无需将数据发送到外部服务。这体现了用自有工具保护内部应用的务实做法。

items.title_en: The MUMPS 76 Primer – anniversary edition
items.title_zh: MUMPS 76 入门教程——周年纪念版
items.summary_en: MUMPS is a programming language with deep ties to healthcare databases. The anniversary primer revisits the language’s syntax and usage, highlighting its enduring relevance and the quirks that have shaped legacy medical software.
items.summary_zh: MUMPS 是一种在医疗保健数据库领域有深远影响的编程语言。周年纪念版入门书回顾了它的语法与使用场景，强调该语言在遗留医疗软件中的持续相关性与独特之处。

items.title_en: Show HN: Bash4LLM+ – A lightweight, dependency-free Bash wrapper for LLM APIs
items.title_zh: Show HN：Bash4LLM+——一个零依赖的 Bash 调用 LLM API 的封装器
items.summary_en: Bash4LLM+ provides a lightweight, dependency-free Bash wrapper to call LLM APIs from the command line, enabling quick automation and scripting around AI prompts. It’s a handy tool for environments where small footprints and reproducibility matter.
items.summary_zh: Bash4LLM+ 提供一个轻量、零依赖的 Bash 封装器，用于从命令行调用 LLM API，方便对 AI 提示进行快速自动化和脚本化。在追求小型占用与可重复性的环境中尤其实用。

items.title_en: My main Android phone is now 99% Google free
items.title_zh: 我的主力 Android 手机现在几乎完全摆脱了 Google 依赖
items.summary_en: Simon Dalvai documents migrating his main Android phone to a Google-free setup, using open-source Play services replacements and privacy-centric apps.
items.summary_zh: Simon Dalvai 记录了将主力 Android 手机几乎完全摆脱 Google 的过程，使用开源替代服务和更注重隐私的应用。文章探讨了应用兼容性、生态系统痛点，以及实现真正开放、隐私友好移动体验的可行性。

items.title_en: Bashblog – a single bash script to create blogs
items.title_zh: Bashblog：用一个 Bash 脚本搭建博客
items.summary_en: A minimal blogging workflow powered by one Bash script that handles post creation and publishing. It demonstrates how frugal tooling can replace heavier CMS stacks for personal sites.
items.summary_zh: 一个用单一 Bash 脚本实现的极简博客工作流，负责创建和发布文章。它展示了简约工具链如何替代重量级 CMS 来搭建个人站点。

items.title_en: Show HN: NanoEuler – GPT-2 scale model in pure C/CUDA from scratch
items.title_zh: Show HN：NanoEuler——用纯 C/CUDA 从零实现的 GPT-2 规模模型
items.summary_en: NanoEuler is a pure C/CUDA implementation of a GPT-2 scale model from scratch, emphasizing low-level optimization and portability. The project demonstrates how a modern LLM stack can be built with minimal dependencies, highlighting performance tradeoffs.
items.summary_zh: NanoEuler 是用纯 C/CUDA 从零实现的 GPT-2 规模模型，强调底层优化与可移植性。该项目展示了在极少依赖下构建现代 LLM 堆栈的可行性，并揭示了性能权衡。

items.title_en: You might not need a service worker
items.title_zh: 你可能不需要服务工作者
items.summary_en: Many modern web apps can operate offline or with lighter caching strategies without a service worker, depending on app requirements. The post argues that service workers add complexity and are not always necessary for a robust offline experience, and suggests alternatives like server-driven caching or simple hard updates.
items.summary_zh: 对于某些场景，现代 Web 应用完全可以在没有服务工作者的情况下实现离线能力，或采用更简单的缓存策略。文章认为服务工作者并非在所有场景中都是必要的，并提出可选的替代方案以简化实现与维护。

items.title_en: Programmable Probabilistic Computer with 1M p-bits
items.title_zh: 可编程概率计算机：具备 100 万 p 位
items.summary_en: Researchers demonstrate a programmable probabilistic computer built from one million p-bits, capable of tackling sampling and optimization tasks with potential energy efficiency advantages. This hardware approach may influence AI workloads and probabilistic computing research.
items.summary_zh: 研究团队展示了一个由一百万 p 位组成的可编程概率计算机，适用于采样与优化任务，潜在的能效优势也被提及。这一硬件路线或为 AI 工作负载与概率计算研究带来新方向。

items.title_en: British Origami: the 1955 exhibition by Akira Yoshizawa (2005)
items.title_zh: 英国折纸：1955 年 Akira Yoshizawa 的展览
items.summary_en: The 1955 exhibition by Akira Yoshizawa in Britain helped popularize origami as a modern art and design discipline, influencing education and craft worldwide.
items.summary_zh: 1955 年 Akira Yoshizawa 在英国举办的展览推动了折纸成为现代艺术与设计学科，影响了全球的教育与工艺实践。

items.title_en: Computer-Aided Language Development in Nonspeaking Children (1968) [pdf]
items.title_zh: 非语言表达儿童的电脑辅助语言发展（1968）
items.summary_en: This 1968 paper documents early computer-aided approaches to language development in nonspeaking children, foreshadowing assistive tech and human-computer interaction in education. It shows how early researchers used machines to support communication and learning.
items.summary_zh: 这篇1968年的论文记录了早期计算机辅助的非语言表达儿童语言发展方法，预示了教育领域的辅助技术与人机交互。研究展示了通过机器来支持沟通与学习的初步尝试。

items.title_en: Jimmy is a tool to convert your notes from different formats to Markdown
items.title_zh: Jimmy：把笔记从不同格式转换为 Markdown 的工具
items.summary_en: Jimmy is a utility that converts notes from various formats into Markdown, helping to unify notes across ecosystems and improve portability. The project highlights the ongoing interoperability challenge in the note-taking space and offers a practical tool for developers and power users who migrate data.
items.summary_zh: Jimmy 是一个将不同格式笔记转换为 Markdown 的工具，帮助统一跨生态的笔记数据、提升可移植性。该项目凸显笔记应用之间的互操作性挑战，适合进行数据迁移的开发者和重度用户使用。

items.title_en: Why frontier LLMs can't read the hard documents without experts involved
items.title_zh: 前沿大模型在阅读难懂文档时为何离不开专家？
items.summary_en: Frontier LLMs struggle to reliably interpret hard-domain documents without human experts due to gaps in training data, interpretability, and the need for domain-specific prompting. The piece argues for human-in-the-loop workflows, specialized datasets, and guardrails to reach trustworthy performance in high-stakes reading tasks.
items.summary_zh: 前沿大模型在理解高难度领域文档时往往需要人类专家参与，原因包括训练数据缺口、可解释性不足与需依赖领域特定提示。文章主张采用人机协同、专业数据集与安全控制来在高风险阅读任务中获得更可信的表现。

items.title_en: The Boeing 747 begins its final descent
items.title_zh: 波音 747 正进入最终退役阶段
items.summary_en: The Boeing 747, long the icon of global air travel, is nearing retirement as fleets and routes shift to more efficient jets. The piece traces the 747's engineering legacy, economic drivers of its sunset, and the challenges of maintaining aging aircraft while demand evolves.
items.summary_zh: 作为全球航空旅行的象征，波音 747 即将退役，全球航线与机队的更新推动其退出市场。文章回顾了 747 在工程与全球经济中的影响，以及在需求和维护成本变化背景下退役所面临的挑战。

items.title_en: Model Training as Code
items.title_zh: 把模型训练当作代码
items.summary_en: The post argues for encoding training pipelines as code, enabling version control, reproducibility, and CI/CD for ML. Treating training like software helps track experiments, share configurations, and audit results across teams.
items.summary_zh: 文章主张把模型训练流程写成可版本化的代码，借助版本控制、可重复性和持续集成/交付实现更可控的训练。以这种方式记录实验、共享配置并对结果进行审计。

items.title_en: Halvar's Guide to Entrepreneurship
items.title_zh: Halvar 的创业指南
items.summary_en: Thomas Dullien (Halvar) shares pragmatic, no-nonsense guidance for starting and growing a tech business, covering common pitfalls, customer engagement, and sustainable product strategy. The guide emphasizes focusing on real user value, disciplined decision-making, and avoiding overhype when building a company.
items.summary_zh: Thomas Dullien 的创业指南提供实用、直截了当的创业要点，聚焦用户价值、产品策略与绕开常见陷阱。內容强调以客户为中心、保持克制的决策，以及避免过度炒作来稳定公司成长。

items.title_en: We found a bug in the hyper HTTP library
items.title_zh: 在 Hyper HTTP 库中发现一个 Bug
items.summary_en: Cloudflare researchers found a bug in the Hyper HTTP library, a core Rust HTTP stack used by many projects. The issue could affect correctness or performance and has prompted a patch and escalation to upstream. The incident underscores how even mature dependencies can harbor subtle defects with wide-scale impact on web infrastructure.
items.summary_zh: Cloudflare 的研究团队在 Rust 的 Hyper HTTP 库里发现了一个 Bug，该库是许多项目的核心 HTTP 栈。该问题可能影响正确性或性能，现已提交补丁并上报上游。此事凸显了即使是成熟的依赖也可能隐藏微妙的缺陷，对网页基础设施有广泛影响。

items.title_en: NUMA: Cores, memory, and the distance between them
items.title_zh: NUMA：核心、内存与它们之间的距离
items.summary_en: NUMA architecture matters because the distance between a CPU core and its memory affects latency and bandwidth. The piece explains how memory locality and interconnect topology shape real-world performance, and why thread placement and data placement strategies matter for databases, analytics, and HPC workloads. It highlights practical guidelines for software design and system tuning to minimize cross-node traffic.
items.summary_zh: NUMA 架构决定了 CPU 内核与内存之间的距离会直接影响延迟和带宽。文中讲解了内存局部性与互连拓扑如何在实际场景中拉高或拉低性能，以及为什么线程与数据放置策略对数据库、分析或高性能计算工作负载至关重要。给出降低跨节点通信开销的实用建议。

items.title_en: The Baffling World of Masayoshi Son's Presentations (2020)
items.title_zh: Masayoshi Son 演示的怪异世界（2020）
items.summary_en: The piece surveys Masayoshi Son's distinctive presentation style, including dramatic slides and forward-looking visions that influence investor sentiment. It reveals how his rhetoric shapes SoftBank's bets and public perception, for better or worse.
items.summary_zh: 文章梳理软银创始人孙正义的独特演示风格：夸张的幻灯片、宏大愿景如何影响投资者情绪与市场预期，揭示其话语风格在软银投资策略与公众认知中的作用。

items.title_en: Type-checked non-empty strings
items.title_zh: 对非空字符串的类型检查
items.summary_en: A discussion on enforcing non-empty string types to prevent runtime errors, exploring type-level guarantees and the trade-offs between safety and ergonomics in languages like Haskell.
items.summary_zh: 讨论在语言层面对非空字符串进行类型约束，以避免运行时错误，探讨类型级保证与在安全性与可用性之间的权衡，尤其在 Haskell 等语言中的应用。

items.title_en: 1.38 Millimeter Microcontroller
items.title_zh: 1.38 毫米封装的微控制器
items.summary_en: TI's MSPM0C1104 microcontroller ships in an ultra-tiny 1.38-mm package, enabling ultra-compact devices with integrated peripherals and low power needs.
items.summary_zh: TI 的 MSPM0C1104 微控制器采用极小的 1.38 毫米封装，助力超小型设备实现低功耗与集成外设的需求。

items.title_en: Venetian Bridge Brawls in 17th and 18th Century Art
items.title_zh: 威尼斯桥上打斗的艺术描绘（17–18世纪）
items.summary_en: Artworks from the 17th and 18th centuries portray street brawls on Venetian bridges, offering a window into urban life, social tensions, and public space in early modern Venice. These scenes reveal how artists framed city life and influenced cultural memory.
items.summary_zh: 17–18 世纪的艺术作品描绘威尼斯桥上的街头斗殴，提供了对早期现代威尼斯城市场景、社会紧张与公共空间使用的观察。图像与叙事呈现了艺术家如何讲述城市生活并影响文化记忆。

items.title_en: Decker Fantasy Camp 2026
items.title_zh: Decker Fantasy Camp 2026 游戏创作营
items.summary_en: Decker Fantasy Camp 2026 is an indie game jam event inviting developers to create themed games within a short window. It showcases community-driven rapid prototyping and the accelerator effect of themed constraints on creativity.
items.summary_zh: Decker Fantasy Camp 2026 是一个独立游戏创作营，开发者在短时间内围绕指定主题创作作品。该活动凸显社区协作与快速原型的推动力，以及主题约束对创意的激发。

items.title_en: Deciphering basmala
items.title_zh: 解密巴斯马拉（Basmala）
items.summary_en: The post delves into Basmala, the opening phrase of many Islamic texts, examining its linguistic form, religious significance, and historical usage. It situates the phrase within script and culture, clarifying common misconceptions.
items.summary_zh: 文章从语言与文化角度解析巴斯马拉（祈祷名词）在阿拉伯语中的形式、宗教意义以及历史使用情境，揭示常见误解并说明其在文本与书写中的影响。

items.title_en: The Return of Aspect Oriented Programming
items.title_zh: 面向切面编程的回归
items.summary_en: The Return of Aspect Oriented Programming argues that AOP is resurging as software complexity demands cleaner separation of cross-cutting concerns. It reviews modern language tooling and patterns that reduce boilerplate while introducing new pitfalls. The take: AOP remains relevant, but discipline and tooling matter more than ever.
items.summary_zh: 《面向切面编程的回归》指出，随着软件复杂度上升，AOP 因更好地分离横切关注点而重新受到关注。文章评估了现代语言工具与设计模式如何降低样板代码，同时也提醒潜在的实现风险。核心结论是：AOP 仍具价值，但需要合适的工具与一定的自律。

items.title_en: Wallace the 6 inch f/2.8 telescope, building it, and hiking with it
items.title_zh: Wallace 6 英寸 f/2.8 望远镜：自制与徒步携带
items.summary_en: Wallace the 6 inch f/2.8 telescope presents a compact, fast-aperture instrument built for hikers. The project details the build, gear choices, and on-trail performance, offering a blueprint for portable astrophotography gear. It illustrates how small design choices expand observing opportunities outside the observatory.
items.summary_zh: Wallace 6 英寸 f/2.8 望远镜是一件便携、对焦快的徒步向望远镜。文中分享了自制过程、选用的装备与野外实测，提供了便携天文摄影的可行思路。展示了小型设计如何扩展户外观测的边界。

items.title_en: Linux Kills Strncpy
items.title_zh: Linux 放弃使用 strncpy
items.summary_en: Linux is phasing out strncpy due to its unsafe semantics and the risk of buffer overflows.
items.summary_zh: Linux 因 strncpy 的语义不安全及易导致缓冲区溢出而逐步淘汰该函数。文章讨论了更安全的字符串处理替代方案，以及这一改动在现代 C 语言与内核安全中的意义。

items.title_en: Federating Clusters for Zero-Downtime Kubernetes
items.title_zh: 实现零停机的 Kubernetes 集群联邦化
items.summary_en: Linkerd outlines federating clusters to achieve zero-downtime Kubernetes deployments, covering cross-cluster service discovery, config propagation, and smooth rolling updates.
items.summary_zh: Linkerd 介绍了通过集群联邦化实现零停机的 Kubernetes 部署，涵盖跨集群服务发现、配置传播以及平滑滚动更新等要点。

items.title_en: The Forgotten Castles of the Garamantes
items.title_zh: 被遗忘的加拉曼特城堡
items.summary_en: An article revisits the Garamantes, an ancient Saharan civilization, spotlighting their fortress architecture and the tells of trade across the Libyan desert. It showcases how archaeology uncovers sophisticated urban centers in harsh environments, reshaping our understanding of trans-Saharan networks. The piece ties historical engineering to broader questions about climate, transport, and empire in antiquity.
items.summary_zh: 这篇文章重新讲述了古代撒哈拉文明加拉曼特人的故事，聚焦于他们的城堡建筑与穿越利比亚沙漠的贸易网络。考古学揭示了在恶劣环境中仍具备高度城市化程度的证据，重新塑造了我们对跨撒哈拉贸易与帝国的认知。

items.title_en: How we made WINDOW JOIN parallel and vectorized
items.title_zh: 我们如何让 WINDOW JOIN 实现并行化和向量化
items.summary_en: QuestDB explains how they parallelized and vectorized WINDOW JOINs to boost time-series query throughput, detailing data layout, SIMD usage, and batching strategies.
items.summary_zh: QuestDB 解释了在 WINDOW JOIN 实现中如何实现并行化和向量化，以提高时序数据查询的吞吐量，涵盖数据布局、SIMD 使用和分批处理策略。

items.title_en: Idler Magazine
items.title_zh: Idler Magazine（闲者杂志）
items.summary_en: Idler Magazine is a publication exploring culture, philosophy, and thoughtful living, offering long-form essays and design-forward pieces for a reflective tech audience. The platform emphasizes independent thinking and deliberate, low-stress living in a fast-moving digital world.
items.summary_zh: Idler Magazine 是一家发掘文化、哲学与从容生活方式的出版物，提供长文和设计导向的内容，吸引关注反思的科技读者。该平台鼓励独立思考与在快节奏的数字世界中追求从容、低压力的生活方式。

items.title_en: A glitch in February of the year 0
items.title_zh: 公元零年的二月中的故障
items.summary_en: Explores a calendar anomaly centered on February in the mythical year zero, highlighting how date libraries and historical calendars handle edge cases and the gaps in our time-keeping systems.
items.summary_zh: 讨论了围绕公元零年二月的日历异常，揭示日期库和历史日历在边界情形下的处理方式，以及我们时间系统中的漏洞。

items.title_en: Let's Decode the Mystery Bytes [video]
items.title_zh: 让我们解码神秘字节（视频）
items.summary_en: A short video exploring how to interpret mysterious byte sequences and reveal what hidden data might mean.
items.summary_zh: 这段短视频展示了解码神秘字节序列的思路与方法，揭示隐藏数据的可能含义。
